title: Device Settings - All toggles OFF - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons set to OFF in Device Settings should persist after closing tabs, returning to home screen, and restarting the app.
steps: Start Lens app with headset connected, go to Device Settings.
Open each tab and set all toggle buttons to OFF.
Close and reopen each section — verify toggles remain OFF.
Return to Device Home Screen, reopen Device Settings, and check each section — verify toggles remain OFF.
Restart the app, reopen Settings, and check each tab — verify toggles remain OFF.
expected: All toggle buttons set to OFF should persist after closing the tab, settings page, or app.
